ogTitle: Upper Duck Creek vs Upper Eden Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Duck Creek and Upper Eden Creek.
heading: Upper Duck Creek vs Upper Eden Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Duck Creek, New South Wales and Upper Eden Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Eden Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Upper Duck Creek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Duck Creek or Upper Eden Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Duck Creek has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Upper Eden Creek scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Duck Creek scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Eden Creek scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Duck Creek or Upper Eden Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Eden Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
